briefs.title: WorkSafeBC dollar amounts adjusted upward under Workers Compensation Act, effective January 1, 2026
briefs.summary: Starting January 1, 2026, WorkSafeBC (BC's workplace injury insurer) is updating the dollar amounts set out in the Workers Compensation Act. These figures — which affect things like wage-loss benefits and maximum insurable earnings — are adjusted annually to keep pace with inflation or wage changes.
briefs.action_required: Review the updated WorkSafeBC dollar amounts to confirm your payroll and coverage calculations are correct for 2026.

key_dates.label: WorkSafeBC adjusted dollar amounts under Workers Compensation Act take effect

briefs.industries: Labour & Employment, Construction & Development, Professional Services
